exercises.name: Plate Loaded Bench Press
exercises.notes: Up 2.5kg (72.5 -> 75). Nailed a clean 4x5 @ 72.5 at RPE 7 — earned the jump. Target 5 per set, 2 min rest. Brace, controlled descent.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Down to 17.5 per your note (20 was 10/10/8 at RPE 10 — too heavy, form broke). Moved earlier in the session (before Leg Press) so you press fresher. Target a clean 3x10 @ 17.5 — hold reps at 10, add weight before chasing more reps.

exercises.name: Leg Press 45
exercises.notes: Up 5kg (140 -> 145). Did 3x12 @ 140 at RPE 8 — had room. Now slot 3 (after shoulder press) per your swap request. Partial ROM, knee-friendly, controlled.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: 7.5 all 3 sets (10kg broke your form). Target a clean 3x10 with strict form — no swinging, lead with elbows. Once 3x10 is clean, build reps from there next time.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: 70 all 3 sets (you self-progressed 65->70 mid-session last time, 3x15 at RPE 8). Get all 3 clean at 70 at RPE<=8 before adding. Kneeling, facing the stack.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: Hold at 25 (3x12 @ 25 but at RPE 10 last time). Target dropped to 10 — lock a clean 3x10 at lower RPE before pushing reps back to 12. Neutral/pronated grip, no swing.

exercises.name: Pec Deck Fly (drop set)
exercises.notes: NEW chest finisher, replaces the bicep preacher on Day A. FIRST TIME — weights are placeholders. Set 1: pick a load you fail at ~10-12 reps with strict form; then ONE drop set, no rest between drops: drop ~25-30% -> to failure -> drop again -> to failure. Log the actual weight + reps at each drop and I'll anchor future Day A sessions from your numbers. Squeeze at the contraction, controlled stretch on the way out.
